about_page.heroSubtitle: India's leading ESDM and Medical Electronics Incubator, located on the 500+ acre campus of IIT Patna.
about_page.visionText: Be the leading technology business incubator in the country for the development of products and intellectual property (IP) in the area of Electronic System Design and Manufacturing (ESDM) with a special focus on Medical Electronics.
about_page.missionText: We are particularly keen to work with companies who, through their innovative solutions, will make healthcare accessible and affordable to the common man.
about_page.backgroundP1: The Incubation Centre, IIT Patna (IC IITP) is a result of a collaboration between the Government of India (47%) and the Government of Bihar (53%), constituting a ₹47.10 Crore undertaking tied to India's MAKE IN INDIA initiative. It is registered as the IC IITP Society (Reg. No. 987, 2015–16).
about_page.backgroundP2: Located on IIT Patna's 500+ acre campus at Bihta, Patna, the centre operates across three primary domains: Electronic System Design & Manufacturing (ESDM), Medical Electronics, and Information & Communication Technology (ICT). It supports startups through mentoring, access to technical facilities, office space, and seed funding.
about_page.backgroundP3: Since inception, IC IITP has screened over 1,000 business plans, supported 100+ startups across six incubation schemes, facilitated 25 patent filings, and deployed seed capital through 600+ funding transactions.
partners: Govt. of Bihar (IT, Industries & S&T Depts.)
about_page.governanceDesc: 17 members including Director IIT Patna, Government nominees, and industry representatives.
about_page.evalTeamDesc: 14 domain experts from academia, industry, and investment community.
about_page.staffDesc: 18 operational staff members running day-to-day incubation activities.
